MERCHANT SHIPPING (COUNTING AND
REGISTRATION OF PERSONS ON BOARD PASSENGER
SHIPS)

[ L.S. 234.58

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 234.58
REGOLAMENTI DWAR MERCHANT SHIPPING
(COUNTING AND REGISTRATION OF PERSONS ON
BOARD PASSENGER SHIPS)
21 ta’ Diċembru, 2019

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 346 tal-2019.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
